prompts.title: FPV Forest Flight
prompts.prompt: FPV drone racing through redwood forest, morning mist, golden sunlight, photorealistic
prompts.tips: Low chaos (15) maintains consistency across frames.

prompts.title: Aerial Alpine Valley
prompts.prompt: Aerial drone shot of an alpine valley with snow-capped peaks and a winding river, dramatic side lighting creating long shadows, atmospheric haze in valley, golden hour
prompts.tips: Moderate stylize (250) balances realism with beauty.

prompts.title: Cyberpunk Tokyo Tracking
prompts.prompt: Tracking shot through neon-lit Tokyo streets at night, rain-slicked pavement reflecting cyberpunk signs, crowds of people with umbrellas, cinematic, film grain
prompts.tips: Higher stylize (400) enhances neon colors.

prompts.title: Low Angle Hero Shot
prompts.prompt: Low angle hero shot of a warrior standing on a cliff edge overlooking a vast fantasy landscape, dramatic rim lighting, windswept hair and cloak, golden hour
prompts.tips: 9:16 perfect for mobile and social media.

prompts.title: Push-In Coffee Craft
prompts.prompt: Slow push-in on artisan hands crafting a latte, steam rising, warm morning light from cafe window, photorealistic, shallow depth of field
prompts.tips: Vertical format ideal for social stories.

prompts.title: Editorial Fashion Portrait
prompts.prompt: Editorial fashion portrait of a woman in a bold red outfit against a brutalist concrete wall, shot on Hasselblad medium format, soft diffused lighting, desaturated color palette
prompts.tips: Medium format camera reference adds realistic depth-of-field.

prompts.title: Cinematic Character Close-Up
prompts.prompt: Cinematic portrait of an elderly fisherman with weathered hands and deep wrinkles, natural window light from left, warm morning atmosphere, background of a coastal harbor, documentary photography style
prompts.tips: Specifying light direction creates natural-looking portraits.

prompts.title: Hyper-Realistic Cinematic Portrait
prompts.prompt: A hyper-realistic cinematic portrait of a handsome man with a rugged jawline and short, messy dark hair, wearing dark round sunglasses and a textured leather jacket, dramatic side lighting, shallow depth of field
prompts.tips: Hyper-realistic + specific features = consistent character generation.

prompts.title: Vintage Street Photography
prompts.prompt: Man walking his dog on a street, you can see his full body, like an old vintage photograph, film fuji color
prompts.tips: Film fuji color reference creates warm analog tones.

prompts.title: Sustainable Forest Retreat
prompts.prompt: A serene wellness retreat nestled in a redwood forest, architectural photography, built from cross-laminated timber and rammed earth walls, large panoramic windows framing the trees, dappled sunlight filtering through the canopy, geothermal heating, green roof, hyper-realistic, 8k
prompts.tips: Material specificity (CLT, rammed earth) guides architectural accuracy.

prompts.title: Parametric Facade
prompts.prompt: A stunning parametric facade on a corporate headquarters, algorithmic architecture, a complex woven structure of glass and white composite panels, reflecting a dynamic sky, highly detailed intricate patterns, futuristic, wide-angle lens, photorealistic render
prompts.tips: Parametric + algorithmic keywords create organic geometric patterns.

prompts.title: Tadao Ando Style Gallery
prompts.prompt: A small art gallery, architectural photography, in the style of Tadao Ando, masterful use of raw concrete and natural light, serene spatial composition, profound silence, minimalist, dramatic shadow play
prompts.tips: Named architect reference strongly guides the architectural style.

prompts.title: Luxury Chronograph Watch
prompts.prompt: Orbital product photography of a luxury chronograph watch on dark marble, single spotlight from above creating premium reflections, studio lighting, photorealistic
prompts.tips: Zero chaos ensures perfect consistency. Low stylize for accuracy.

prompts.title: Perfume Bottle Elegance
prompts.prompt: Elegant perfume bottle on a mirrored surface, scattered rose petals, soft side lighting creating depth and drama, luxury cosmetics photography, pastel pink and gold tones
prompts.tips: Mirrored surface doubles the visual impact.

prompts.title: Skincare Ad with Text
prompts.prompt: A minimalist Instagram ad for a skincare brand, pastel color palette, with a bottle of serum and a short tagline "Glow Daily"
prompts.tips: V7 text rendering is improved but keep text to 2-4 words max.

prompts.title: Futuristic Transport Hub
prompts.prompt: Futuristic conceptual architecture, a transportation hub with aerodynamic carbon fiber arches and ethereal light tunnels, speculative design, bio-inspired structures, neon glow, foggy atmosphere, epic scale, concept art, Unreal Engine 5 render
prompts.tips: 21:9 ultrawide ratio enhances the epic architectural scale.

prompts.title: Dark Fantasy Poster
prompts.prompt: Create a dark fantasy poster with a young red-haired woman surrounded by mystical elements in a gloomy setting, gothic aesthetic, dramatic lighting
prompts.tips: Gothic aesthetic + dramatic lighting creates the dark mood.

prompts.title: 1970s Dark Fantasy Frazetta Style
prompts.prompt: 1970s dark fantasy movie poster style, barbarian warrior on a throne, Frank Frazetta inspired, oil painting texture, warm amber tones, heavy shadows
prompts.tips: Higher stylize (400) enhances the painterly oil painting quality.

prompts.title: Ghibli Fishing Scene
prompts.prompt: Close-up of a boy fishing in the river and catching a fish, captured with the finesse of Ghibli's storytelling, lush green background, soft lighting, detailed background
prompts.tips: Ghibli reference captures the warm, hand-painted anime aesthetic.

prompts.title: Anime Forest Girl with SREF
prompts.prompt: A girl standing in a mystical forest, anime illustration style, vibrant colors, detailed eyes, cel shading, dynamic pose, studio ghibli inspired, soft lighting, detailed background
prompts.tips: SREF 7435 adds a vibrant anime/manga color style.

prompts.title: Futuristic Vehicle 3D
prompts.prompt: 3D-Illustration of a futuristic vehicle with smooth surfaces and dynamic lines, illuminated under a starry sky, octane render, volumetric lighting
prompts.tips: Octane render reference creates realistic 3D material quality.

prompts.title: Isometric City Map
prompts.prompt: Create an isometric representation of a complex, futuristic city map in which all buildings and streets are in perfect harmony with each other and visible from a bird's eye view
prompts.tips: Isometric perspective creates a readable, infographic-style layout.

prompts.title: Misty Mountain Village
prompts.prompt: Crane shot descending over a misty mountain village at sunrise, traditional stone buildings with slate roofs, narrow winding cobblestone streets, warm golden light breaking through fog layers, cinematic
prompts.tips: Fog + golden hour creates atmospheric depth.

prompts.title: Aurora Borealis
prompts.prompt: Aurora borealis time-lapse over a warm lit log cabin in the snowy wilderness, vivid green and purple lights dancing in the sky, reflection on a frozen lake, long exposure photography
prompts.tips: Higher stylize (500) enhances the magical quality of auroras.

prompts.title: Metallic Paint Collision
prompts.prompt: Two streams of metallic paint colliding in mid-air, gold and teal, frozen in time, high-speed photography style, black background, abstract art
prompts.tips: High chaos (30) creates unique variations each generation.

prompts.title: Geometric Light Refraction
prompts.prompt: Geometric light refraction through crystal prisms, creating rainbow spectrum patterns, top-down view, multiple light sources, album cover art
prompts.tips: Album cover art keyword nudges toward centered, balanced framing.

prompts.title: Jazz Night Event Poster
prompts.prompt: A digital poster for a jazz night event with the words "Smooth Sounds Tonight" in glowing letters, moody lighting, neon aesthetic, dark background
prompts.tips: Keep text to 2-4 words. Neon glow masks text rendering imperfections.

prompts.title: Neon Sign Typography
prompts.prompt: Neon sign reading "DREAM BIG" mounted on a dark brick wall, warm glow reflecting on wet pavement below, atmospheric, urban photography style
prompts.tips: Neon text renders more reliably than printed text.
